title: General Caster issue with casting result
excerpt: I am using general caster to cast the result to people column. but when the board is refreshed then  the result gets reset. Any ideas.

posts.author: SachinGV (Sachin Pradhan )
posts.cookedHtml: I am using general caster to cast the result to people column. but when the board is refreshed then the result gets reset. Any ideas.

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @SachinGV
I guess it’s a monday.com problem, please contact their support.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml: Testing and chatting with Rob. Will post DOW if necessary!

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @SachinGV!

Is the issue still occurring for you? Just tested this out on my end and it seems to be working as expected.

If you want to DM me a screenshot of what you have, I’m happy to take a look and let you know if I see any syntactical errors or anything!

-Helen
